brief.speaker: grayson
brief.text: Total wages paid across this workforce. All of it. In cents, because that's how my accountants like it.

hints.text: Grayson: 'That's not the total. SUM adds. AVG averages.'
Grayson: 'SUM. Of the wage column. Single row, single number.'

success.speaker: grayson
success.text: Nearly two hundred million cents a year. The economy of a small city. Good.
